title: festuca ovina var. robusta
intro: Festuca ovina var. robusta, also known as robust sheep's fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of robust sheep's fescue include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
